title: post register with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/register endpoint with valid candidate and employer data to ensure successful registration returns 201 Created with user id.

title: post login with valid credentials
description: Test the POST /api/login endpoint with valid user credentials to verify successful authentication returns 200 OK with session cookie.

title: post logout with valid session
description: Test the POST /api/logout endpoint with a valid session cookie to ensure the user session is ended and returns 200 OK.

title: get whoami with valid session
description: Test the GET /api/whoami endpoint with a valid session cookie to verify it returns 200 OK with current authenticated user information.

title: post employer job with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/employer/job endpoint with valid employer session and job data to ensure job is created and returns 201 Created with job id.

title: get jobs feed without authentication
description: Test the GET /api/jobs/feed endpoint without authentication to verify it returns 200 OK with a list of all available jobs including walk-in badges and addresses when applicable.

title: put employer job edit with owner session
description: Test the PUT /api/employer/job/<job_id>/edit endpoint with the employer who owns the job and valid updated fields to ensure the job is updated and returns 200 OK with updated job data.

title: get candidate matched jobs with valid session
description: Test the GET /api/candidate/matched-jobs endpoint with a valid candidate session cookie to verify it returns 200 OK with a list of AI-matched jobs.

title: post candidate apply with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/candidate/apply endpoint with a valid candidate session, job_id, and optional resume text to ensure application is created or updated and returns 201 Created or 200 OK with application id and match_score.

title: get candidate job salary check with valid session
description: Test the GET /api/candidate/job/<job_id>/salary-check endpoint with a valid candidate session cookie to verify it returns 200 OK with AI salary assessment and rationale.
